title: Smart Money Concepts + SMT + Sweep
author: frank7285
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Smart Money Concepts + SMT + Sweep by frank7285.

Description: All-in-one indicator based on LuxAlgo concepts, built to combine three powerful institutional analysis tools into a single script: • Smart Money Concepts (SMC) • SMT Divergences • Institutional Sweeps This script allows you to visualize internal and swing market structure, BOS, CHoCH, order blocks, equal highs/lows, fair value gaps, multi-timeframe highs and lows, premium/discount zones, SMT divergences, and institutional sweeps — all from one indicator.
Each module includes … Possible indicators: SMA.
